title: 조동사 should, had better, would like to

stages.concept:
# Unit 057: 조동사 should, had better, would like to - 개념톡

👩‍🏫 선생님: 오늘은 **should, had better, would like to**에 대해 배워볼까요?

👩‍🏫 선생님: **should** — ~해야 한다, ~하는 게 좋겠다 (충고/조언)

> You **should** exercise regularly.
> 너는 규칙적으로 운동해야 해.

> She **should** see a doctor.
> 그녀는 의사를 만나야 해.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **부정**: should not (shouldn't)

> You **shouldn't** stay up late.
> 너는 늦게까지 깨어 있으면 안 돼.

**Q. 다음 중 '충고/조언'이 아닌 것을 고르세요.**
1. You should exercise regularly. (충고)
2. She should see a doctor. (충고)
3. I would like to order a pizza. ✅ (희망)

👩‍🏫 선생님: **had better** — ~하는 편이 낫다 (경고/강한 충고)

> You **had better** hurry up, or you'll be late.
> 서두르는 게 낫겠어, 안 그러면 늦을 거야.

> She **had better** study hard for the exam.
> 그녀는 시험을 위해 열심히 공부하는 게 낫겠어.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **부정**: had better not

> You **had better not** be late again.
> 다시 늦지 않는 게 좋을 거야.

👩‍🏫 선생님: **would like to** — ~하고 싶다 (want to의 공손한 표현)

> I **would like to** order a pizza.
> 피자를 주문하고 싶습니다.

> **Would** you **like to** join us?
> 함께 하시겠어요?

🧑‍🎓 학생: should는 조언, had better는 강한 충고, would like to는 공손한 원함! 잘 기억할게요.
stages.practiceA:
# Unit 057: 조동사 should, had better, would like to - 연습문제 A

**01.** 우리 말에 맞게 보기 안에서 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
그녀는 화장실을 사용한 후에는 불을 꺼야 한다.
She (     ) turn off the light after using the bathroom.
> **정답** should

---

**02.** 나는 피자를 먹고 싶다.
I (     ) eat pizza.
> **정답** would like to

---

**03.** 너는 지금 출발하는 게 좋겠다.
You (     ) leave now.
> **정답** had better

---

**04.** 그는 더 많이 운동해야 한다.
He (     ) exercise more.
> **정답** should

---

**05.** 너는 서두르는 게 좋겠다.
You (     ) hurry up.
> **정답** had better

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
You should to drink more water.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to drink → drink

---

**07.** She had better goes home early.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** goes → go

---

**08.** He would like to plays tennis.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** plays → play

---

**09.** We should not wastes food.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** wastes → waste

---

**10.** You had better not to be late.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to be → be

---

**11.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 알맞은 말을 쓰시오.
너는 일찍 자야 한다.
You go to bed early.
> **정답** should

---

**12.** 나는 새 책가방을 사고 싶다.
I buy a new backpack.
> **정답** would like to

---

**13.** 너는 우산을 가져가는 게 좋겠다.
You take an umbrella.
> **정답** had better

---

**14.** 우리는 쓰레기를 버리지 말아야 한다.
We throw away trash.
> **정답** should not (shouldn't)

---

**15.** 그녀는 차를 마시고 싶어 한다.
She drink some tea.
> **정답** would like to

---

**16.** 우리말에 맞게 다음 단어들을 바르게 배열하시오.
너는 선생님의 말을 들어야 한다.
should listen to You the teacher
> **정답** You / should / listen / to / the / teacher

---

**17.** 나는 영화를 보고 싶다.
would I like to watch a movie
> **정답** I / would / like / to / watch / a / movie

---

**18.** 너는 빨리 가는 게 좋겠다.
had You better go quickly
> **정답** You / had / better / go / quickly

---

**19.** 우리는 환경을 아껴야 한다.
should the environment We protect
> **정답** We / should / protect / the / environment

---

**20.** 너는 거짓말하지 않는 게 좋겠다.
had better You not lie
> **정답** You / had / better / not / lie
stages.practiceB:
# Unit 057: 조동사 should, had better, would like to - 연습문제 B

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
쓰레기는 쓰레기통에 넣어야 해요.
You __________ put trash in the litter bin.
had better
should
can
would like to
• litter bin 쓰레기통
> **정답** should

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
너는 서두르는게 좋겠어. 너는 이미 늦었어.
You __________ hurry up. You are already late.
will
had better
would like to
should
> **정답** had better

---

**03.** 다음 중 부정형의 형태가 잘못된 것을 고르시오.
can - cannot
had better - had not better
should - should not
may - may not
> **정답** had better - had not better

---

**04.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
[2개]
여름방학때 나는 바다에 놀러가고 싶다.
I had to go to the sea during summer vacation.
I would like to go to the sea during summer
vacation.
I'd like to go to the sea during summer
vacation.
I had better go to the sea during summer
vacation.
> **정답** I would like to go to the sea during summer vacation., I'd like to go to the sea during summer vacation.

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
You should exercise regularly.
You must turn off your mobile phone.
You shouldn't eat too much late at night.
You had not better play outside.
> **정답** You had not better play outside.

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오. [2개]
She would like to drink coffee.
You have better do your homework.
You had better not run here.
You would better eat more vegetables.
> **정답** You had better not run here., She would like to drink coffee.

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
She had better go shopping with me.
You have better study math at study hall
session.
We would like to having a pet.
I would like read the book tonight.
> **정답** She had better go shopping with me.

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 알맞지 않은 것을 고르시오.
[2개]
A: I can't finish my homework.
B: You __________ play with your cell phone too long.
would like to
shouldn't
couldn't
had better not
> **정답** couldn't, would like to

---

**09.** 다음 문장을 부정문으로 바꿀 때 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
He can ride a bike
→ He cannot ride a bike.
You had better go there.
→ You had not better go there .
You should return the books.
→You shouldn't return the books.
They will watch a movie.
→ They won't watch a movie.
> **정답** You had better go there. → You had not better go there .

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이번 여름 축제에 올래?
Would you like to coming to the festival this
summer?
Would you like to come to the festival this
summer?
Should you come to the festival this summer?
Do you have to come to the festival this
summer?
> **정답** Would you like to come to the festival this summer?

---

**11.** 다음 문장의 빈 칸에 알맞은 조동사를 고르시오.
너는 수업 중에 휴대폰을 사용하면 안돼.
You __________ use your cell phone in the class.
would like to
should not
had better not
have to
• had better not ~하지 않는 게 좋다
> **정답** should not

---

**12.** 다음 대화문에서 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
A: I would like be a class
president this semester. What should I
do (     )
B: You had think better about
what students need. And You should help
the students.
A: Thank you. You are very helpful to me.
• class president 반장
• semester 학기
> **정답** would like to be, should, do, had better think, should help

---

**13.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐
쓰시오.
너는 오늘 병원에 가는 것이 낫겠다.
You have better go to a doctor today.
> **정답** had better, go

---

**14.** 다음 문장의 빈 칸에 알맞은 조동사를 고르시오.
그들은 아이들을 돌봐야 한다.
They _____________________ children.
would like to take care of
should take care of
may take care of
had better take care of
> **정답** should take care of

---

**15.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
They hadn't better wait for us.
You should choose between the two.
My mom would like to join the cooking class.
You shouldn't bother animals.
> **정답** They hadn't better wait for us.

---

**16.** 다음 빈칸에 공통으로 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
You __________ wash your hands before you eat.
You __________ look around before you cross the
street.
would like
should
would like to
should not
> **정답** should

---

**17.** 다음 문장의 빈 칸에 알맞은 조동사를 고르시오.
방에서 나갈 때는 불을 끄는 게 좋겠어.
You ___________________ turn off the light when you
leave the room.
had better
will
can
would like to
> **정답** had better

---

**18.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
You should not to watch TV
too close.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** to watch → watch

---

**19.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
I would like to going skiing
with my friends this winter.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** going → go

---

**20.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
You had not better give your
dog too much snack.
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
> **정답** not better → better not
stages.descriptive:
# Unit 057 조동사 should, had better, would like to중1 (중등) - 서술형문제

**01.** <보기>의 조동사와 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문의 답을
완성하시오.
<보기>
had better / would like to / check
A: The car won't start. It is broken.
B: You  (     )   (     )   (     )  your car often.
정답 had, better, check

---

**02.** <보기>의 조동사와 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문의 답을
완성하시오.
<보기>
would like to / ought to / join
A:  (     )  you  (     )   (     )   (     )  us? We will go
shopping.
B: Yes, I’d like to.
정답 Would, like, to, join

---

**03.** <보기>의 조동사와 주어진 말을 이용하여 질문의 답을
완성하시오.(축약형으로 쓸 것)
<보기>
would like to / should / drive
A: It’s raining heavily. You  (     )   (     )  today.
B: All right, thanks for the advice.
정답 shouldn’t, drive

---

**04.** 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 알맞은 조동사와 주어진 말을
이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
너는 자리를 정리하고 떠나는 것이 좋겠다. [clear up]
You  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  your seat and
leave here.
정답 had, better, clear, up

---

**05.** 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 알맞은 조동사와 주어진 말을
이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
너는 수업시간에 필기를 해야 한다. [take notes]
You  (     )   (     )   (     )  in class.
정답 should, take, notes

---

**06.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[Amy]  [would]  [like]  [to]  [going]  [to]
[see]  a  [movie.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 going → go

---

**07.** 아래 문장에서 틀린 부분을 선택하고, 맞게 고쳐쓰세요.
[He]  [had]  [better]  [takes]  a  [break.]
틀린 부분만 고쳐 쓰세요. (생략가능)
정답 takes → take

---

**08.** 세명의 학생에 관한 내용을 보고 <보기>와 같이 충고하는
글을 완성하시오.
Subin: She doesn't read her art books.
Minseo: She doesn't clean her room.
Joowon: He eats too much chocolate.
<보기> Subin had better read her art books.
[1] Minseo  (     )   (     )   (     )  her room.
[2] Joowon  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )  too much
chocolate.
정답 had, better, clean, had, better, not, eat

---

**09.** 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 알맞은 조동사와 주어진 말을
이용하여 문장을 완성하시오. (축약형으로)
너는 탄산음료를 너무 많이 마시면 안된다. [drink, soda]
You  (     )   (     )   (     )  too much.
정답 shouldn't, drink, soda

---

**10.** 우리말과 뜻이 같도록 알맞은 조동사와 주어진 말을
이용하여 문장을 완성하시오.
산책하러 갈래요? [take a walk]
 you  (     )   (     )   (     )   (     )   (     ) (     )
정답 Would, like, to, take, a, walk

---
stages.practical:
# Unit 057: 조동사 should, had better, would like to - 변형문제

**01.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
쓰레기는 분리수거해야 해요.
You __________ sort the recycling. had better should can would like to
> 정답: should

---

**02.** 우리말에 맞게 빈칸에 들어갈 알맞은 말을 고르시오.
너는 지금 출발하는게 좋겠어. 너는 이미 늦었어.
You __________ leave now.
You are already late. will had better would like to should
> 정답: had better

---

**03.** 다음 중 부정형의 형태가 잘못된 것을 고르시오.
can - cannot had better - had not better should - should not may - may not
> 정답: had better - had not better

---

**04.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오. [2개]
겨울방학때 나는 스키장에 놀러가고 싶다.
I had to go to the ski resort during winter vacation.
I would like to go to the ski resort during winter vacation.
I'd like to go to the ski resort during winter vacation.
I had better go to the ski resort during winter vacation.
> 정답: I would like to go to the ski resort during winter

---

**05.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
You should exercise every day.
You must turn off your phone.
You shouldn't eat too many sweets.
You had not better play outside.
> 정답: You had not better play outside.

---

**06.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오. [2개]
She would like to drink juice.
You have better do your project.
You had better not run here.
You would better eat more fruit.
> 정답: You had better not run here., She would like to drink

---

**07.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 맞는 것을 고르시오.
She had better go to the library with me.
You have better study English at home.
We would like to having a hamster.
I would like read the comic tonight.
> 정답: She had better go to the library with me.

---

**08.** 다음 빈칸에 들어갈 말이 알맞지 않은 것을 고르시오. [2개]
A: I can't finish my project.
B: You __________ play games too long. would like to shouldn't couldn't had better not
> 정답: couldn't, would like to

---

**09.** 다음 문장을 부정문으로 바꿀 때 틀린 문장을 고르시오.
He can ride a bike → He cannot ride a bike.
You had better go there. → You had not better go there .
You should return the books. →You shouldn't return the books.
They will watch a drama. → They won't watch a drama.
> 정답: You had better go there. → You had not better go

---

**10.** 다음 중 주어진 우리말을 바르게 영작한 것을 고르시오.
이번 겨울 파티에 올래?
Would you like to coming to the party this winter?
Would you like to come to the party this winter?
Should you come to the party this winter?
Do you have to come to the party this winter?
> 정답: Would you like to come to the party this winter?

---

**11.** 다음 문장의 빈 칸에 알맞은 조동사를 고르시오.
너는 수업 중에 간식을 먹으면 안돼.
You __________ eat snacks in the class. would like to should not had better not have to
> 정답: should not

---

**12.** 다음 대화문에서 어법상 어색한 것을 골라 고쳐 쓰시오.
A: I would like be a team leader this semester.
What should I do ?
B: You had think better about what team members need.
And You should help the members.
A: Thank you.
You are very helpful to me.
> 정답: would like to be, should, do, had better think, should

---

**13.** 주어진 우리 말을 영작할 때 틀린 곳을 찾아 바르게 고쳐 쓰시오.
너는 오늘 치과에 가는 것이 낫겠다.
You have better go to a dentist today.
> 정답: had better, go

---

**14.** 다음 문장의 빈 칸에 알맞은 조동사를 고르시오.
그들은 동물들을 돌봐야 한다.
They _____________________ animals.
would like to take care of should take care of may take care of had better take care of
> 정답: should take care of

---

**15.** 밑줄 친 부분이 어법상 틀린 것을 고르시오.
They hadn't better wait for us.
You should choose between the two options.
My mom would like to join the yoga class.
You shouldn't disturb animals.
> 정답: They hadn't better wait for us.
